name: Cannabis Suisse Corp.
summary: Cannabis Suisse Corp. engages in the cultivation and distribution of recreational tobacco products and medical CBD oils in Switzerland. The company sells its products through a distribution network of retailers and online shops under the Swiss4Life retail brand. The company was formerly known as Geant Corp. and changed its name to Cannabis Suisse Corp. in February 2019. Cannabis Suisse Corp. was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Dietikon, Switzerland.
